text: Pedestrians shall not be permitted upon any vehicular crossing, unless unobstructed sidewalks of more than three feet in width are constructed and maintained and signs indicating that pedestrians are permitted are in place.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 13. Vehicular Crossings and Toll Highways [23250 - 23336]
#### Article 4. Special Traffic Regulations [23330 - 23336]
##### § 23331

Pedestrians shall not be permitted upon any vehicular crossing, unless unobstructed sidewalks of more than three feet in width are constructed and maintained and signs indicating that pedestrians are permitted are in place.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*
